description: Find a UI element by locator strategy and selector. Use any strategy string the Appium driver accepts for the current platform.
when_to_use: User asks to locate an element
Agent needs elementId before tap/type/read text
After get_page_source when building selectors from the current screen XML
prerequisites: Prefer get_page_source (or get_page_source_file) first when the UI layout or attributes are unknown

slot_prompts.strategy: Locator strategy (xpath, accessibility id, id, etc.). Default is xpath.

examples.query: Find login button by accessibility id
